subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: A Class 1 building must be provided with—

ol.li: a kitchen sink and facilities for the preparation and cooking of food; and
clothes washing facilities, comprising at least one washtub and space in the same room for a washing machine; and

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: If any of the facilities in (1) are detached from the main building, they must be set aside for the exclusive use of the occupants of the building.

ul.li: A kitchen sink or washbasin must not be counted as a laundry washtub. A laundry washtub is considered to provide the necessary means to dispose of waste water as required by H4P3(2).
Installation requirements for certain electrical or gas cooking appliances may influence the selection of surrounding materials or the clearance to those materials.
